description: Maps Geo-Layer-Viewer layer IDs to energy project preparation use cases. Reference this file instead of hardcoding layer IDs.

solar-neighbourhoods.use: Solar PV potential (PVOUT, GHI, DNI) per neighbourhood from Global Solar Atlas

dynamic-world.use: Land cover classification for constraint filtering and land availability scoring

flood-risk-index.use: Flood risk exclusion/penalty for infrastructure siting

ghsl-built.use: Built-up density for rooftop vs ground-mount technology decisions
ghsl-built.techRelevance: Determines rooftop PV potential vs ground-mount suitability

ghsl-population.use: Population density for beneficiary estimation and demand sizing

viirs-night-lights.use: Proxy for grid infrastructure proximity and electrification status

copernicus-dem.use: Terrain slope for ground-mount solar feasibility

jrc-surface-water.use: Water body exclusion for ground-mounted infrastructure

ibge-settlements.use: Informal settlement locations for energy access prioritization

transit-stops.use: Public transit accessibility of candidate sites

transit-routes.use: Transit network coverage for workforce/maintenance access

modis-ndvi.use: Vegetation index — context for environmental impact assessment

hansen-forest-loss.use: Forest loss history — flag areas with deforestation pressure

chirps-r95p.use: Extreme precipitation frequency — infrastructure resilience planning

era5-txx.use: Extreme temperature — affects PV panel efficiency and storage performance

heatwave-magnitude.use: Heatwave projections — demand-side context for cooling/efficiency bundles

flood-2024.use: 2024 flood extent — historical validation of flood risk model
